/CAL  SENTENCING/AJW/CH1 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 86D/CTS  86/4019HALF/WS/DNACOMP/IND/RX/X: NO ALCOHOL/DTC/WEAP/RESTV/X:  STAY AWAY ORDERS AS TO YVEA ODETTEEATON & LOGAN M - 150 YARDS  AND 684 GUERRERO ST IN SF & LEONARD FLYNN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL AT 3125   CESAR CHAVEZ ST IN SF - 150 YARDS; AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED AND ISSUED ON 03-13-17/DEF:  SHALL COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PLAN AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE BY BHC PROGRAM AND MUST NOT INCUR ANY NEW ARRESTS/X: IF THE DEFENDANT LEAVES BHC PROGRAM OR IS TERMINATED, THEY MAY AT THE COURT'S DISCRETION SERVE ADDITIONAL CUSTODY TIME OR BE SENTENCED TO STATE PRISON,/CTORD: THAT IF THE DEFENDANT IS PLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AND LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, THEY WILL BE IN VIOLATIONOF THE BHC PROGRAM AND MAY SERVE ADDITIONAL TIME IN CUSTODY/X: THERE WILLBE NO EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION WITHOUT AGREEMENT OF THE BHC PROGRAM,//X: IF THE DEFENDANT COMPLETES THE BHC PROGRAM AND COMPLETES PROBATION, CHARGES MAY BE REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANORS PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) WITH PROPER FILING OF MOTION,/X: IF THE DEFENDANT COMPLETES THE BHC PROGRAM AND AT LEAST1 YEAR OF APD PROBATION, THEY MAY WITHDRAW THEIR PLEA AND ENTER A NEW PLEATO A MISD VIOLATION OF PC 242,/VF4: 300/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD: FINES AND FEES IN THIS MATTER ARE SUSPENDED AND RESERVES THE RIGHT TO REINSTATE FINES AND FEES/OBEY/ACCEP/PROB ADM REV/NB/CONTD: BEHAVIOR COURT REPORT/DOP/

docket_entries.docketEntryComment: /CAL  SENTENCING/AJW/CH1 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 86D/CTS  86/4019HALF/WS/DNACOMP/IND/RX/X: NO ALCOHOL/DTC/WEAP/RESTV/X:  STAY AWAY ORDERS AS TO YVEA ODETTEEATON & LOGAN M - 150 YARDS  AND 684 GUERRERO ST IN SF & LEONARD FLYNN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL AT 3125   CESAR CHAVEZ ST IN SF - 150 YARDS; AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED AND ISSUED ON 03-13-17/DEF:  SHALL COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PLAN AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE BY BHC PROGRAM AND MUST NOT INCUR ANY NEW ARRESTS/X: IF THE DEFENDANT LEAVES BHC PROGRAM OR IS TERMINATED, THEY MAY AT THE COURT'S DISCRETION SERVE ADDITIONAL CUSTODY TIME OR BE SENTENCED TO STATE PRISON,/CTORD: THAT IF THE DEFENDANT IS PLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AND LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, THEY WILL BE IN VIOLATIONOF THE BHC PROGRAM AND MAY SERVE ADDITIONAL TIME IN CUSTODY/X: THERE WILLBE NO EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION WITHOUT AGREEMENT OF THE BHC PROGRAM,//X: IF THE DEFENDANT COMPLETES THE BHC PROGRAM AND COMPLETES PROBATION, CHARGES MAY BE REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANORS PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) WITH PROPER FILING OF MOTION,/X: IF THE DEFENDANT COMPLETES THE BHC PROGRAM AND AT LEAST1 YEAR OF APD PROBATION, THEY MAY WITHDRAW THEIR PLEA AND ENTER A NEW PLEATO A MISD VIOLATION OF PC 242,/VF4: 300/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD: FINES AND FEES IN THIS MATTER ARE SUSPENDED AND RESERVES THE RIGHT TO REINSTATE FINES AND FEES/OBEY/ACCEP/PROB ADM REV/NB/CONTD: BEHAVIOR COURT REPORT/DOP/
